channel.title: Claude on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Claude on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Rubber Duck in GitHub Copilot CLI now supports more models
item.description:
Rubber Duck in GitHub Copilot CLI now supports additional model combinations. It can use a Claude-powered critic agent in GPT sessions, with support also extended for Claude-based sessions.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Claude Opus 4.7 is generally available
item.description:
Claude Opus 4.7 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub says early testing showed improved multi-step task performance and more reliable agentic execution.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Model selection for Claude and Codex agents on github.com
item.description:
GitHub.com now lets users select the model when starting Claude and Codex third-party coding agent runs. The feature is available for these agents, similar to Copilot cloud agent.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Dependabot alerts are now assignable to AI agents for remediation
item.description:
Dependabot alerts can now be assigned to AI coding agents for remediation, including Copilot, Claude, and Codex. This is intended for vulnerabilities that require code changes beyond a simple dependency version update.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Claude and Codex now available for Copilot Business & Pro users
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Business and Copilot Pro customers can now use Anthropic Claude and OpenAI Codex as coding agents. Copilot Enterprise and Pro+ customers got access earlier in February 2026.

  • Source: GitHub
